title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Hiranandani Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Hiranandani Group
jsonLd.description:
Hiranandani Group has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hiranandani Group:
Hiranandani Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hiranandani Group!
